start.txt: Alright, this should be far enough.

fine.txt: Good! I was worried the crash would be too much for us.

fine2.txt: I'm glad you were able to steer away from the larger trees, haha!

what2.txt: Oh, it was the engine.. it took too much damage..

what3.txt: I thought it was sturdier than that. I'm just glad you were driving!

anyway.txt: Anyway, since we got away from the crash site, we should look around.

anyway2.txt: There's a clearing up ahead, let's try there first.
